symbol_selection_policy.acceptance_condition: Every evaluated symbol must have one PAPER_SYMBOL_EVIDENCE_ONLY scorecard and all live/order flags false.
symbol_selection_policy.deterministic_priority: candidate_selection_score DESC, net_ev_after_cost_bps DESC, selection_priority ASC; pullback requires UPTREND alignment score>=0.70 and vwap_distance>=-0.25pct, setup confirmation thresholds volume>=1.05 or momentum>=1.50 for pullback, volume>=1.20 and range_breakout>=0.03 for breakout, RANGE and VWAP distance>=0.35 for mean reversion; trend exhaustion guard volatility>=3.00pct and momentum>=3.00pct and volume>=1.50 applies -42bps edge
symbol_selection_policy.fallback_behavior: Use configured single symbol when no universe is supplied; block with RISK_OFF/MEASUREMENT_MISSING when no valid public candle source exists.
